case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ERNESTO EDWIN OSORIO MENDOZA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2020 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA, ERNESTO EDWIN OSORIO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, ERNESTO EDWIN OSORIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED DEC-16-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, ERNESTO EDWIN OSORIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ERNESTO EDWIN OSORIO MENDOZA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $862.63 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, ERNESTO EDWIN OSORIO
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, ERNESTO EDWIN OSORIO
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN, INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS,LLC
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS,LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, ERNESTO EDWIN OSORIO
